name: LoadWFBitStream
title: LoadWFBitStream
description: The function loads a bit stream (a sequence of bit values) for the channel from the specified file.The bit stream is used to stimulate the ECU using a digital signal.

parameters.name: filepath
parameters.description: Path of the file containing the bit stream.The path can be given absolute or relative to the CANoe configuration.

description: The following example demonstrates how to use the bit stream voltage output of a VT2516 channel for digital stimulation. In this example a bit stream is loaded from the file BitStream.TXT and played back on channel DOut. More details for the output of bit streams can be found on CANoe online help topics VT2516: Bit Stream Output and VT2848: Bit Stream Output.

availability: Main method of test nodes VT offline
